ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ui_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each UI component */,
  "component_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the component types table */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp of the component */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_types" (
  "component_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component type */,
  "component_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the component type (e.g., selector, multiSelector) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the ui_components table */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property (e.g., mode, range) */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Data type of the property (e.g., string, number, object array) */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the property */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the property is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_property_values" (
  "property_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property value */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the component_properties table */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the property */,
  "sequence_number" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_value_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the ui_components table */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., onChange) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_history" (
  "event_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event history entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the events table */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the ui_components table */,
  "event_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the event */,
  "event_data" TEXT /* Data associated with the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_history_id")
)
